ground_truth.title: Databricks Certified Machine Learning Professional
ground_truth.main_content: The Databricks Certified Machine Learning Professional certification validates your expertise in machine learning and data science using the Databricks platform. This certification is designed for data scientists and machine learning engineers who use Databricks Machine Learning to perform advanced machine learning tasks in production environments. Candidates should have 2+ years of experience in data science and machine learning, along with hands-on experience with Databricks Machine Learning. The certification exam consists of multiple-choice questions that assess your ability to work with the full machine learning lifecycle on Databricks. Upon passing the exam, you earn a verified digital badge that can be shared on professional networking platforms and resumes. The certification demonstrates your proficiency in distributed machine learning, feature engineering, model training, and MLOps practices using the Databricks platform.
